top_stocks.description:
• Alamos Gold is a gold and precious metals producer operating primarily in Canada and Mexico, focused on the Island Gold, Young-Davidson, and Mulatos districts.
• Mid-cap classification with a market cap in the tens of billions, characterized by a high Return on Invested Capital (ROIC).
• Market position is strengthened by a significant dividend increase and internal funding capabilities for growth projects.
top_stocks.latest_news: • Alamos reported Q4 and Year-End 2025 results
